suite: # Conservative manual warning policy for local benchmark results.
# This file is a warning guide, not a formal SLA or checked-in numeric baseline.

notes: CSV batch should remain faster than process-per-file at 16 files
JSON batch should remain faster than process-per-file at 16 files
HTML batch should retain strong batch advantage at 16 files
DOCX batch should remain faster than process-per-file at 16 files
PDF batch should retain strong batch advantage at 16 files
Warn if PDF batch RSS unexpectedly exceeds 64 MB
Warn if DOCX batch RSS unexpectedly exceeds 64 MB
PDF profiling should complete without failures
DOCX golden smoke benchmark should stay within a conservative latency ceiling
DOCX golden smoke benchmark should keep producing one asset
